milestone: Cloud-Primary Project Storage — Phase 2: World Builder rewire
slice: js/projectStore.js's internals now read/write through js/projectCache.js's in-memory Map mirror instead of localStorage -- its public API (list/get/create/save/duplicate/remove/getStorageStats) kept 100% signature- and return-shape-identical, so every one of the ~150 real call sites across worldBuilderApp.js is unaffected. save()/duplicate() now always return {ok:true} synchronously (the in-memory mirror can't fail to update); a new ProjectStore.onPersistError(fn) surfaces the rare residual failure (IndexedDB AND its own localStorage emergency fallback both failing) asynchronously instead. _checkIdentityGate() now hydrates the cache in parallel with the identity check. _scheduleCloudSync() no longer performs the push itself -- ProjectCache.putLocal() already durably queues + drains it; this function's remaining job is live badge feedback via a new ProjectCache.onSyncStateChange(fn) pub/sub and ProjectCache.enqueueSync(id). The conflict escape hatch (_forceOverwriteCloud) now routes through a new ProjectCache.forceSync(id) (a genuine unconditional push) instead of re-enqueuing via the conditional path, which would have conflicted again instead of overwriting. _attemptQuotaSelfHeal() is retired outright -- nothing left to heal from now that save() can't fail under any realistic condition; _persist()'s error branch and _setSaveState('error')'s AV-009-era "try a smaller image" messaging are both simplified/reworded to match. js/creatorProjectCache.js (Studio's own Phase 4 target, still fully uncalled) received matching hardening in the same pass. Verified via a 13-assertion Playwright suite exercising ProjectStore/ProjectCache directly (durable IndexedDB write confirmed by opening the DB from the test itself; a Project survives a full reload with the LEGACY localStorage key deliberately wiped; onPersistError genuinely fires only when IndexedDB AND its own localStorage fallback both truly fail, via page.addInitScript breaking both before any app script runs) plus a 12-assertion Playwright suite driving the real Workspace UI end-to-end (a real edit -> dirty/saved badge cycle -> durably confirmed in IndexedDB -> cloud badge settling to "Backed up" via the new onSyncStateChange path with a real versioned push -> a forced conflict correctly shown -> the force-overwrite badge click correctly resolving via the new unconditional path) -- zero console errors. Both goldenBuild.js suites (30/30 each) pass unchanged. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder architecture change, no supabase/schema.sql change. Phases 3 (cloud-first Welcome screen, Storage Meter repurpose), 4 (Studio ProjectStore rewire + CreatorProjectSync.push() versioned-conflict hardening), 5 (Studio cloud-first restore/My-Projects freshness), 6 (final verification + docs/PROJECT_CLOUD_ARCHITECTURE.md + ship) remain named, not-yet-started increments -- see CLAUDE.md's own entry and the plan file's phased rollout section.
